ch04: class AsyncLLM: async def generate(self, prompt, sampling_params, request_id) -> AsyncGenerator[RequestOutput]
AsyncLLM._add_request(request, prompt_str, ...) — 双登记扇出: OutputProcessor.add_request + engine_core.add_request_async
AsyncLLM._run_output_handler() / output_handler() — 背景 asyncio 任务: 拉取->分块 process_outputs->put 队列, 块间 asyncio.sleep(0)
AsyncLLM.abort(request_id) — OutputProcessor + EngineCore 双向清理
class RequestOutputCollector: def put(output); async def get() -> RequestOutput; def get_nowait() -> RequestOutput | None  (单槽 + asyncio.Event + merge)
class OutputProcessor: def add_request(request, queue) — 登记 req_id->queue; def process_outputs(outputs) — 按 req_id 解多路复用 queue.put
class InputProcessor: def process_inputs(prompt, params, request_id) -> EngineCoreRequest (Stage1 黑盒, 内部留 ch05)
class InProcessEngineCore: async def add_request_async(req); async def get_output_async() -> EngineCoreOutputs; async def abort_requests_async(req_ids) (Stage2 IPC 接缝替身, 同名同签名, IPC 留 ch07)
dataclass EngineCoreRequest / EngineCoreOutput(finished: bool) — 跨进程边界消息
VLLM_V1_OUTPUT_PROC_CHUNK_SIZE = 128 — output_handler 分块让步常量
ch05: class InputProcessor: def process_inputs(request_id, prompt, params: SamplingParams|PoolingParams, supported_tasks, arrival_time=None, lora_request=None, tokenization_kwargs=None, trace_headers=None, priority=0, data_parallel_rank=None, resumable=False) -> EngineCoreRequest — Stage1 主入口: 参数/LoRA 校验->兜底 tokenize/多模态->模型输入校验->params.clone()补全->多模态 placeholder 排序展平->组装 EngineCoreRequest->assign_request_id

InputProcessor._validate_params / _validate_lora / _validate_model_inputs / _validate_model_input / _validate_prompt_len — 校验族: token 越界判定 max_input_id > max(tokenizer.max_token_id, model_vocab_size-1)
staticmethod InputProcessor.assign_request_id(request: EngineCoreRequest) — external_req_id 预设报错; request_id = f"{external}-{random_uuid():.8}" (16 hex 截 8)
InputProcessor._get_mm_identifier(mm_hash, lora_request) -> str — 含 LoRA 前缀的多模态缓存键

class EngineCoreRequest (msgspec.Struct array_like/omit_defaults/gc=False) — 跨进程 IPC 载荷: request_id/external_req_id, prompt_token_ids/prompt_embeds/prompt_is_token_ids, mm_features, sampling_params|pooling_params, arrival_time, lora_request, cache_salt, priority, data_parallel_rank; .params 属性统一返回 sampling 或 pooling
class MultiModalFeatureSpec(data, modality, identifier, mm_position: PlaceholderRange, mm_hash) / class PlaceholderRange(offset, length, is_embed); argsort_mm_positions 按 offset 升序展平 (modality, idx)

class InputPreprocessor: def preprocess(prompt, tokenization_kwargs=None) -> EngineInput — raw-prompt(deprecated) 兜底: enc-dec / decoder-only 分流, _tokenize_prompt 出 token ids; split_enc_dec_input 拆复合为 (encoder, decoder)

class ParentRequest: get_child_info(index) -> (child_req_id="{index}_{request_id}", SamplingParams); _get_child_sampling_params(index) — n=1; 有 seed seed+index, 无 seed 复用克隆; get_outputs(...) 流式逐条转发 / FINAL_ONLY 按 index 聚合攒齐 n 个
ch03: VllmConfig.__post_init__()  # 串起 platform defaults / async_scheduling 三态决策 / O0-O3 优化级回填
Executor.get_class(vllm_config: VllmConfig) -> type  # mp/uni/external_launcher 工厂
SchedulerConfig.get_scheduler_cls() -> type  # async_scheduling -> AsyncScheduler else Scheduler
EngineCoreClient.make_client(multiprocess_mode: bool, asyncio_mode: bool, vllm_config, executor_class, log_stats) -> EngineCoreClient
EngineCoreClient.make_async_mp_client(vllm_config: VllmConfig, executor_class: type, log_stats) -> AsyncMPClient  # DP 维度细分 AsyncMPClient/DPAsyncMPClient/DPLBAsyncMPClient
ch06: class ParentRequest: __init__(request) 存 request_id/external_req_id/sampling_params, 预置 child_requests:set / output_aggregator(FINAL_ONLY 预分配 n 槽,否则[]) / cached_child_sampling_params; finished = not child_requests

OutputProcessor.add_request(request, prompt, parent_req=None, request_index=0, queue=None) — 每 child 建独立 RequestState(request_index=idx->CompletionOutput.index); 登记 parent_requests[parent_id]=parent 与 external_req_ids[external].append(internal) 反查表
OutputProcessor.abort_requests(request_ids, internal) -> list[internal_ids] — 对外 id 经 external_req_ids 反查全部内部 child; 内部父 id 经 parent_requests 级联 abort 未完成 child
RequestState.make_request_output(output) -> RequestOutput|None — 有 parent_req 走 parent_req.get_outputs 归并, outputs 空则 return None, RequestOutput.request_id 改回 external_req_id
ParentRequest.get_child_info(index) -> (child_req_id, child_sampling_params) — child_req_id = f"{index}_{request_id}"(index 前缀于已随机化父内部 id, 唯一+可反查), 登记进 child_requests 集合
ParentRequest._get_child_sampling_params(index) -> SamplingParams — 强制 child.n=1; 有 seed: 每 child 独立 clone seed=seed+index(确定性递进, 不缓存); 无 seed: 复用 cached_child_sampling_params 同一对象

ParentRequest.get_outputs(child_request_id, completion_output) -> (list[CompletionOutput], finished) — 流式逐条转发+去重已返还 child; FINAL_ONLY 按 output.index 写 output_aggregator, child_requests 空才整批吐; finished = not child_requests
ch07: EngineCoreProc.process_input_sockets / process_output_sockets (两个 IO 线程) + input_queue/output_queue
EngineCoreRequestType(IntEnum->byte tag): ADD=b'\x00' ABORT UTILITY EXECUTOR_FAILED WAKEUP — 单字节标签协议, send_multipart 第二帧
MsgpackEncoder.encode/encode_into -> (main_frame, *aux_buffers); _encode_tensor 三分支 inline(<256B&cpu)/aux_buffers/OOB consumer — 多帧零拷贝
TensorIpcSender.send_tensor -> TensorIpcData(metadata) + 共享内存旁路; TensorIpcReceiver.recv drain-and-buffer 乱序重组 — 零拷贝多模态张量

MPClient: ROUTER bind + PULL; _send_input=(identity,type.value,*encoded) send_multipart; call_utility(_async) call_id=uuid1>>64 + Future RPC; BackgroundResources.validate_alive 见 ENGINE_CORE_DEAD 抛 EngineDeadError
ch08: class RequestOutputCollector: def put(output: RequestOutput|Exception); async def get() -> RequestOutput; def get_nowait() -> RequestOutput|None — 单槽邮箱(output|None)+asyncio.Event，DELTA 用 RequestOutput.add 归并、CUMULATIVE 替换，Exception 抢占重抛 (兑现 ch04 f1)

class OutputProcessor: def add_request(request, prompt, parent_req, index, queue) -> RequestState; def process_outputs(engine_core_outputs, ...) -> OutputProcessorOutput — 单循环按 req_id 解多路复用、收集 reqs_to_abort 反向 abort EngineCore; def _finish_request(req_state) — 注销 request_states/parent_requests/lora; def has_unfinished_requests()/get_num_unfinished_requests()/propagate_error(e)

class RequestState: def from_new_request(...) -> RequestState; def make_request_output(new_token_ids, pooling, finish_reason, stop_reason, kv_transfer_params) -> RequestOutput|None — stream_interval/首token/完成 三态门控发不发; is_prefilling: bool; output_kind: RequestOutputKind

class IncrementalDetokenizer: def from_new_request(tokenizer, request) -> IncrementalDetokenizer; def update(new_token_ids, stop_terminated) -> str|None — 增量去token + check_stop_strings 截断; def get_next_output_text(finished, delta) -> str (delta 用 stop_buffer_length 回退); output_token_ids: list[int]; check_stop_strings(...) 搜索窗口
class LogprobsProcessor: def from_new_request(...) -> LogprobsProcessor; def update_from_output(output); def pop_prompt_logprobs() -> list|None — DELTA 一次性 pop prompt logprobs

class ParentRequest: def get_outputs(child_index, child_req_output) -> RequestOutput|None — n>1 父聚合: 流式逐子转发+child_requests 递减、FINAL_ONLY 用 output_aggregator 攒齐 n 个一次返回、already_returned 不重发 (承接 ch06 ParentRequest 扇出)

async def output_handler(engine_core, output_processor, ...) — f3 生产者背景任务: 拉 EngineCoreOutputs->chunk_size 分块->process_outputs->put 各 per-request 队列, 反向 abort; async def generate(q: RequestOutputCollector, stream_finished) — f3 消费者: get_nowait/get drain 至 finished
